title: [Proposal] Let MCP server filter out deleted elements
body:
Hello,

I've been using the MCP server with claude to pull in my Excalidraw scenes for interactively building a UI.
The problem I ran into almost immediately is that a simple UI sketch was nearly 3k lines of json, which claude automatically used a sub-agent to parse. I started wondering why the json data was so long, and determined that since I'm new to Excalidraw there were a lot of deleted elements lurking in the elements list (`"isDeleted": true`)

I'd like to suggest making `get_scene_content` only return elements where `"isDeleted": false` by default, (or creating a different method for this?) so claude can fetch and analyze just the visible parts of my drawing. The only use for the deleted elements I can think of would be in the editor's undo feature, but when returned to claude they just clog up the context window.

Thanks!
author: martin-c

title: Feature Request: Faster node/tree creation workflow
body: **Description** Creating node-based diagrams currently requires a lot of repetition: create a node, create another node, connect them, reposition them, and repeat. It would be useful to have a quick way to grow diagrams from existing nodes. For example, when a node is selected, a small "+" action could appear that: * Creates a new node * Automatically connects it to the selected node * Places it with sensible spacing This would make building trees, graphs, mind maps, org charts, and similar diagrams much faster. **Why this is useful** * Reduces repetitive node creation and connector drawing * Speeds up whiteboarding and diagram creation * Makes it easier to build and modify large node-based structures * Useful across many use cases, not just trees **Suggested approach** Add a "+" action when a node is selected. Clicking it would: 1. Create a new connected node 2. Automatically draw the connector 3. Allow users to continue expanding from any node **Future Scope** * Provide generators/templates for frequently used structures like binary tree and other tree layouts A mockup showing the proposed "+" interaction **Examples** Does this fit Excalidraw's vision? 🙂 I'd be happy to work on an implementation.
author: NandavardhanRadhakrishnan

title: excelidraw screen is all over the screen - can't coe on leetcode or oop exercises
author: aviv-barel

title: Cannot generate subgraphs of Excalidraw using Mermaid text
body: I attempted to generate subgraphs using the Mermaid text examples provided in the [document](https://docs.excalidraw.com/docs/@excalidraw/mermaid-to-excalidraw/api#subgraphs). ```md flowchart TB c1-->a2 subgraph one a1-->a2 end subgraph two b1-->b2 end subgraph three c1-->c2 end ``` However, the console reported an error. `Error processing Mermaid diagram: Error: SubGraph element not found` This resulted in a direct downgrade to an image. The same Mermaid text can be used at https://excalidraw.com/ The errors that were previously discovered through the parseMermaidToExcalidraw interface are now found to also exist in the Mermaid to Excalidraw function of the header tools in . https://github.com/excalidraw/mermaid-to-excalidraw/issues/107
author: loushan

title: Wise Financial Consultancy
body:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Wise Financial Consultancy — Financial & Business Advisory</title>
<meta name="description" content="Kenya's only integrated personal finance coaching, business strategy, and debt-to-investment advisory firm. Starting from Ksh 1,500/mo.">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;600;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  :root {
    --deep-navy: #0A1628;
    --midnight: #122140;
    --gold: #C49A22;
    --gold-light: #E8B832;
    --gold-pale: #F9EFC7;
    --cream: #FDFAF4;
    --white: #FFFFFF;
    --slate: #4A5568;
    --slate-light: #718096;
    --border: rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.2);
    --font-display: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
    --font-body: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
  }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: var(--font-body);
    background: var(--cream);
    color: var(--deep-navy);
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* NAV */
  nav {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    z-index: 100;
    background: rgba(10, 22, 40, 0.97);
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.15);
    padding: 0 2rem;
    height: 68px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .nav-logo {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .nav-logo-mark {
    width: 36px;
    height: 36px;
    background: var(--gold);
    border-radius: 6px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: var(--deep-navy);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .nav-logo-text {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 17px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--white);
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .nav-logo-sub {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-family: var(--font-body);
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 2rem;
    list-style: none;
  }

  .nav-links a {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 400;
    transition: color 0.2s;
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  }

  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold-light); }

  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--gold) !important;
    color: var(--deep-navy) !important;
    padding: 8px 20px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-weight: 600 !important;
    font-size: 13px !important;
    transition: background 0.2s !important;
  }

  .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--gold-light) !important; }

  .hamburger {
    display: none;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 5px;
    cursor: pointer;
    background: none;
    border: none;
    padding: 4px;
  }

  .hamburger span {
    width: 22px; height: 2px;
    background: var(--white);
    border-radius: 2px;
    display: block;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }

  .mobile-menu {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    top: 68px; left: 0; right: 0;
    background: var(--deep-navy);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 1.5rem 2rem;
    z-index: 99;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 1rem;
  }

  .mobile-menu.open { display: flex; }

  .mobile-menu a {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 15px;
    padding: 0.5rem 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  }

  .mobile-menu a:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

  /* HERO */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    background: var(--deep-navy);
    background-image:
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 60% 40%, rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.08) 0%, transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.05) 0%, transparent 50%);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 120px 2rem 80px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='60' height='60' viewBox='0 0 60 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cg fill='none' fill-rule='evenodd'%3E%3Cg fill='%23C49A22' fill-opacity='0.04'%3E%3Cpath d='M36 34v-4h-2v4h-4v2h4v4h2v-4h4v-2h-4zm0-30V0h-2v4h-4v2h4v4h2V6h4V4h-4zM6 34v-4H4v4H0v2h4v4h2v-4h4v-2H6zM6 4V0H4v4H0v2h4v4h2V6h4V4H6z'/%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    opacity: 0.6;
  }

  .hero-inner {
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    width: 100%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 380px;
    gap: 4rem;
    align-items: center;
    position: relative;
  }

  .hero-eyebrow {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.12);
    border: 1px solid rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.25);
    color: var(--gold-light);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  .hero-eyebrow::before {
    content: '';
    width: 6px; height: 6px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--gold-light);
  }

  h1 {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: clamp(36px, 5vw, 60px);
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--white);
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  h1 em {
    color: var(--gold);
    font-style: normal;
  }

  .hero-desc {
    font-size: 17px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
    max-width: 520px;
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
    line-height: 1.8;
  }

  .hero-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--gold);
    color: var(--deep-navy);
    padding: 14px 28px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 15px;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .btn-primary:hover {
    background: var(--gold-light);
    transform: translateY(-1px);
  }

  .btn-outline {
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
    padding: 14px 28px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: 500;
    font-size: 15px;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .btn-outline:hover {
    border-color: var(--gold);
    color: var(--gold);
  }

  .hero-stats {
    display: flex;
    gap: 2rem;
    margin-top: 3rem;
    padding-top: 2rem;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  }

  .hero-stat-value {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--gold);
  }

  .hero-stat-label {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    margin-top: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  }

  /* Hero Card */
  .hero-card {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    border: 1px solid rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.2);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 2rem;
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  }

  .hero-card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 20px;
    color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  .hero-card-sub {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  .hero-card-step {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    padding-bottom: 1rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  }

  .hero-card-step:last-child { border-bottom: none; margin-bottom: 0; padding-bottom: 0; }

  .step-num {
    width: 28px; height: 28px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.15);
    border: 1px solid rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.3);
    color: var(--gold);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-top: 1px;
  }

  .step-content strong {
    display: block;
    color: var(--white);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .step-content span {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
  }

  /* SECTIONS */
  section { padding: 90px 2rem; }

  .section-inner { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }

  .section-eyebrow {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }

  h2 {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 42px);
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--deep-navy);
    line-height: 1.15;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .section-lead {
    font-size: 17px;
    color: var(--slate);
    max-width: 580px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 3rem;
  }

  /* SERVICES */
  #services { background: var(--white); }

  .services-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
    gap: 1.5rem;
    margin-top: 1rem;
  }

  .service-card {
    border: 1px solid #E8ECF0;
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 2rem;
    transition: all 0.3s;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .service-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 3px;
    background: var(--gold);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    transition: transform 0.3s;
  }

  .service-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(10, 22, 40, 0.08); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .service-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }

  .service-icon {
    width: 48px; height: 48px;
    background: var(--gold-pale);
    border-radius: 12px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
    font-size: 22px;
  }

  .service-card h3 {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--deep-navy);
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }

  .service-card p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--slate);
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  }

  .service-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 4px 10px;
    border-radius: 100px;
  }

  .badge-launch { background: #EAF9F0; color: #176B3A; }
  .badge-phase2 { background: #F0F0FF; color: #4A3A99; }

  /* PROGRAMME */
  #programme { background: var(--deep-navy); }

  #programme h2 { color: var(--white); }
  #programme .section-lead { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }

  .programme-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
    gap: 1px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius: 16px;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin-top: 2rem;
  }

  .programme-step {
    background: rgba(10, 22, 40, 0.5);
    padding: 2rem 1.75rem;
    position: relative;
  }

  .prog-num {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 48px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.15);
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  .programme-step h3 {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 17px;
    color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  .prog-months {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }

  .programme-step p {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .programme-jane {
    margin-top: 2.5rem;
    background: rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.2);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 2rem;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
    gap: 1.5rem;
    align-items: start;
  }

  .jane-avatar {
    width: 52px; height: 52px;
    background: rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.2);
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 2px solid rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.4);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 18px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .jane-label {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  }

  .jane-name {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 18px;
    color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  }

  .jane-desc { font-size: 13px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); margin-bottom: 1rem; }

  .jane-outcome {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  .jane-outcome strong { color: var(--gold); }

  /* PRICING */
  #pricing { background: var(--cream); }

  .pricing-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr));
    gap: 1.5rem;
    margin-top: 2rem;
  }

  .pricing-card {
    background: var(--white);
    border: 1px solid #E8ECF0;
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 2rem;
    position: relative;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }

  .pricing-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(10, 22, 40, 0.08); }

  .pricing-card.featured {
    border: 2px solid var(--gold);
    background: var(--deep-navy);
  }

  .featured-badge {
    position: absolute;
    top: -12px;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    background: var(--gold);
    color: var(--deep-navy);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 4px 14px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .pricing-name {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--slate-light);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }

  .pricing-card.featured .pricing-name { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); }

  .pricing-price {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 36px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--deep-navy);
    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  }

  .pricing-card.featured .pricing-price { color: var(--gold); }

  .pricing-price span {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-family: var(--font-body);
    color: var(--slate-light);
  }

  .pricing-card.featured .pricing-price span { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); }

  .pricing-desc {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--slate);
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .pricing-card.featured .pricing-desc { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }

  .pricing-features { list-style: none; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }

  .pricing-features li {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--slate);
    padding: 5px 0;
  }

  .pricing-card.featured .pricing-features li { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); }

  .pricing-features li::before {
    content: '✓';
    color: var(--gold);
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 12px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .btn-pricing {
    display: block;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 12px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 14px;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }

  .btn-pricing-outline {
    border: 1px solid #E8ECF0;
    color: var(--deep-navy);
  }

  .btn-pricing-outline:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }

  .btn-pricing-gold {
    background: var(--gold);
    color: var(--deep-navy);
  }

  .btn-pricing-gold:hover { background: var(--gold-light); }

  /* ADVANTAGE */
  #advantage { background: var(--white); }

  .advantage-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 4rem;
    align-items: center;
    margin-top: 1rem;
  }

  .compare-table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 13px;
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
  }

  .compare-table th {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 10px 8px;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--slate-light);
    border-bottom: 2px solid #E8ECF0;
  }

  .compare-table th.wise-col {
    color: var(--gold);
    background: rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.05);
    border-radius: 6px 6px 0 0;
  }

  .compare-table td {
    padding: 10px 8px;
    text-align: center;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #F0F0F0;
    color: var(--slate);
    font-size: 13px;
  }

  .compare-table td:first-child { text-align: left; color: var(--deep-navy); font-size: 13px; }

  .compare-table td.wise-col { background: rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.04); }

  .check-yes { color: #16A34A; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; }
  .check-no { color: #E2E8F0; font-size: 16px; }
  .check-partial { color: #EAB308; font-size: 14px; }

  .advantage-points { list-style: none; }

  .advantage-points li {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    align-items: flex-start;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  .advantage-icon {
    width: 44px; height: 44px;
    background: var(--gold-pale);
    border-radius: 10px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 20px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .advantage-points h4 {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 17px;
    color: var(--deep-navy);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  .advantage-points p {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--slate);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* MARKET */
  #market { background: var(--cream); }

  .market-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    gap: 1.5rem;
    margin-top: 2rem;
  }

  .market-card {
    background: var(--white);
    border: 1px solid #E8ECF0;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .market-icon { font-size: 28px; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }

  .market-card h4 {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 17px;
    color: var(--deep-navy);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  .market-card p { font-size: 13px; color: var(--slate); line-height: 1.6; }

  .market-channels {
    margin-top: 3rem;
    background: var(--white);
    border: 1px solid #E8ECF0;
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 2rem;
  }

  .market-channels h3 {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 22px;
    color: var(--deep-navy);
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  .channels-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
    gap: 1rem;
  }

  .channel-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .channel-dot {
    width: 8px; height: 8px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--gold);
    margin-top: 7px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .channel-item strong {
    display: block;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--deep-navy);
    margin-bottom: 2px;
  }

  .channel-item span { font-size: 12px; color: var(--slate); }

  /* FINANCIALS */
  #financials { background: var(--deep-navy); }

  #financials h2 { color: var(--white); }
  #financials .section-lead { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }

  .fin-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 2rem;
    margin-top: 2rem;
  }

  .fin-card {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    border: 1px solid rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.15);
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 2rem;
  }

  .fin-card h3 {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 18px;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  }

  .fin-row {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 10px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    font-size: 14px;
  }

  .fin-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .fin-row span:first-child { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }
  .fin-row span:last-child { color: var(--white); font-weight: 500; }

  .fin-total {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 14px 0 0;
    margin-top: 8px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.3);
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  .fin-total span:first-child { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); }
  .fin-total span:last-child { color: var(--gold); }

  .fin-projection {
    margin-top: 2rem;
    background: rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(196, 154, 34, 0.2);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 1.75rem;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .fin-projection p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }

  .fin-big {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 36px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--gold);
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .fin-range { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); margin-top: 4px; }

  /* CONTACT */
  #contact { background: var(--white); }

  .contact-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 4rem;
    align-items: start;
  }

  .contact-info h3 {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 22px;
    color: var(--deep-navy);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .contact-info p { font-size: 15px; color: var(--slate); line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 2rem; }

  .contact-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .contact-icon {
    width: 40px; height: 40px;
    background: var(--gold-pale);
    border-radius: 10px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 18px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .contact-item strong { display: block; font-size: 13px; color: var(--slate-light); font-weight: 500; }
  .contact-item span { font-size: 14px; color: var(--deep-navy); }

  .contact-form { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; }

  .form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }

  .form-group label {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--deep-navy);
  }

  .form-group input,
  .form-group select,
  .form-group textarea {
    padding: 12px 16px;
    border: 1px solid #E2E8F0;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: var(--font-body);
    color: var(--deep-navy);
    background: var(--cream);
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
    outline: none;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .form-group input:focus,
  .form-group select:focus,
  .form-group textarea:focus {
    border-color: var(--gold);
    background: var(--white);
  }

  .form-group textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 110px; }

  .form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem; }

  .form-submit {
    background: var(--gold);
    color: var(--deep-navy);
    padding: 14px;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 15px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: var(--font-body);
    transition: all 0.2s;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
  }

  .form-submit:hover { background: var(--gold-light); transform: translateY(-1px); }

  .form-note { font-size: 12px; color: var(--slate-light); text-align: center; }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer {
    background: var(--deep-navy);
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    padding: 3rem 2rem;
  }

  .footer-inner {
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 3rem;
  }

  .footer-brand p { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.7; max-width: 260px; margin: 1rem 0 1.5rem; }

  .footer-heading {
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .footer-links { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; }
  .footer-links a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); text-decoration: none; font-size: 13px; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--gold-light); }

  .footer-bottom {
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 2rem auto 0;
    padding-top: 1.5rem;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 1rem;
  }

  /* Toast */
  .toast {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 2rem;
    right: 2rem;
    background: var(--deep-navy);
    color: var(--white);
    padding: 14px 20px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--gold);
    font-size: 14px;
    z-index: 200;
    transform: translateX(200%);
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;
    max-width: 320px;
  }

  .toast.show { transform: translateX(0); }

  /* Scroll reveal */
  .reveal {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(24px);
    transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease;
  }

  .reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: none; }

  /* RESPONSIVE */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .hero-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero-card { display: none; }
    .advantage-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2.5rem; }
    .fin-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 3rem; }
    .footer-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  }

  @media (max-width: 680px) {
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .hamburger { display: flex; }
    section { padding: 60px 1.25rem; }
    .hero { padding: 100px 1.25rem 60px; }
    .hero-stats { flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1.5rem; }
    .form-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .footer-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    nav { padding: 0 1.25rem; }
    .compare-table { font-size: 11px; }
  }
</style>
</head>

<script>
  function toggleMenu() {
    document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.toggle('open');
  }

  function closeMenu() {
    document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.remove('open');
  }

  function handleSubmit(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const toast = document.getElementById('toast');
    toast.classList.add('show');
    setTimeout(() => toast.classList.remove('show'), 4000);
    e.target.reset();
  }

  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        entry.target.classList.add('visible');
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });

  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(link => {
    link.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      const target = document.querySelector(link.getAttribute('href'));
      if (target) {
        e.preventDefault();
        target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
      }
    });
  });
</script>

author: jchebet408-droid

title: Add optional export readiness warnings for common scene issues
body:
Hi, I would like to suggest a UX improvement for the export flow in Excalidraw.

When users export a drawing, there can be issues that are easy to miss while editing, but become visible after exporting. For example, a drawing can contain empty text elements, elements with very low opacity, very large embedded images, or elements that are far away from the main drawing area and may be included in the export by accident.

I think Excalidraw could have optional “export readiness warnings” that check the current scene before export and show possible warnings to the user.

Example situation:

1. A user creates a drawing.
2. The user clicks export.
3. Excalidraw checks the scene for possible export issues.
4. If issues are found, the user sees a small warning summary.
5. The user can still continue exporting, or go back and fix the issues.

Possible warning categories to discuss:

* Empty text elements.
* Elements with very low opacity.
* Very large embedded images that may increase export size.
* Elements far away from the main drawing area that may be included by accident.

Expected behavior:
The warnings should not block the export. They should only help the user notice possible problems before exporting.

Why this could be useful:
This could help users create cleaner exports and avoid common mistakes before saving or sharing their drawing.

Possible implementation idea:

* Add a scene analysis helper that checks visible and non-deleted elements.
* Create clear warning types for different scene issues.
* Show a small warning summary in the export flow.
* Allow the user to continue exporting even if warnings exist.
* Keep the checks lightweight for large scenes.
* Add localization keys for the warning messages.
* Add tests for the scene analysis logic.

I am interested in working on this idea if the maintainers think it fits the project. I would like to first discuss the user problem and intended scope before implementing anything.

I am especially looking for feedback on:

* Which warning categories would be useful for Excalidraw?
* Which warning categories should be avoided to prevent false positives?
* What thresholds would make sense for warnings like low opacity or far-away elements?
* Should this feature live inside the export dialog, or somewhere else in the export flow?

If the maintainers think this feature fits the project, I can work on a scoped version based on that feedback.

title: Add Layers feature + port MCP server into monorepo with full HTTP layer API
body:
## Goal

Add the layers feature (from PR #10447) to this fork, port the yctimlin/mcp_excalidraw server into the monorepo as a workspace package (so it inherits layers), and expose full layer CRUD via dedicated HTTP endpoints.

## Context

- Fork at H:\excalidraw-extra, synced to upstream/master (0642e72c)
- Existing MCP install at C:\Users\NaramSin\mcp_excalidraw (clone of yctimlin/mcp_excalidraw), wired to opencode on port 8200
- Layers PR: https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/pull/10447 (commit 9ae6a88)

## Decisions (approved by user)

1. Layers: cherry-pick 9ae6a88, resolve conflicts
2. Server: monorepo merge (port MCP server into packages/mcp-server, workspace:* dep)
3. Layer API: pass-through (layerId on elements) + dedicated layer CRUD endpoints
4. Deploy: build locally, serve via ported canvas server

## Spec doc

Will be written to .iterations/EXE-01/specs/EXE-01-specs.md

author: yukino-yosei

title: Feature request: drawing/editing synchronization during presentations
body:
When drawing on the canvas on one device (such as a tablet in my case), the canvas updates instantly on another device (in my case a laptop). However if the laptop is set to presentation mode, it no longer updates in real time. When I draw inside a frame on my tablet, nothing happens to the slides on the presentation. Only when exiting the presentation does it synchronize.

**The Proposal:**
I think it would be good to have an option for real time synchronization of slides with the canvas.

A related feature would be the ability to draw on the slides directly in presentation mode.

**Why this is useful:**
This would be useful for teaching, as it would allow Excalidraw+ to essentially work as one of those fancy stacked whiteboards that professors have. In a physical classroom, you could be writing on the board and then after filling it slide it up revealing the board underneath and continue writing. This feature would achieve a similar effect.

**Technical Impact:**

I'm not entirely sure.

title: Pasting a copied/cut shape into an active text box inserts raw excalidraw/clipboard JSON
body: ### Description When I cut or copy an Excalidraw element, then open a text box and paste while editing text, Excalidraw inserts the raw clipboard JSON into the text box instead of pasting the object onto the canvas or ignoring the Excalidraw clipboard data. This results in text like: ```json {"type":"excalidraw/clipboard","elements":[{"id":"JdQ0X6M-24vRjQPW8diTu","type":"rectangle","x":363.890625,"y":262.5859375,"width":359.77734375,"height":303.796875,"angle":0,"strokeColor":"#1e1e1e","backgroundColor":"transparent","fillStyle":"solid","strokeWidth":2,"strokeStyle":"solid","roughness":1,"opacity":100,"groupIds":[],"frameId":null,"index":"a0","roundness":{"type":3},"seed":1685071682,"version":15,"versionNonce":383732638,"isDeleted":false,"boundElements":null,"updated":1782422205369,"link":null,"locked":false}],"files":{}} ``` ### Steps to reproduce 1. Create a rectangle on the canvas. 2. Select the rectangle. 3. Cut or copy it using the keyboard shortcut: - macOS: `Cmd+X` or `Cmd+C` 4. Create or edit a text element. 5. While the text cursor is active inside the text element, paste using: - macOS: `Cmd+V` ### Actual behavior The raw Excalidraw clipboard payload is inserted into the text element as plain text. ### Environment - Browser: Safari - Browser version: 26.5 - OS: macOS Tahoe 26.5
author: parthkotwal

title: Service worker cache limit too low — large assets skipped
body:
## Problem

The current `maximumFileSizeToCacheInBytes` in the Workbox configuration is set to **2.3MB**. Assets larger than this threshold are silently excluded from the service worker cache, which can cause the app to fail to load offline or on slow connections when those assets are needed.

With recent growth in bundle size (fonts, WASM modules, etc.), some assets now exceed this limit and are being skipped.

## Expected behavior

All critical assets should be precached by the service worker regardless of whether they slightly exceed the current 2.3MB threshold.

## Proposed fix

Raise the limit to **3MB** to give enough headroom for current and near-future asset sizes.

title: Command palette shows a mix of two languages after switching language back and forth
body: ## Description After switching the UI language and then switching back (e.g. English → Hindi → English), opening the command palette shows command labels in a **mix of both languages** — most are in the newly selected language, but some remain in the previous one. ## Steps to Reproduce 1. Open Excalidraw (reproducible on https://excalidraw.com and on a local `master` build). 2. Change the language (e.g. English → Hindi) via the language selector. 3. Change it back (Hindi → English). 4. Open the command palette (`Cmd/Ctrl + /`). 5. Observe that some command labels are still in the previously selected language while the rest are in the current one. ## Expected Behavior All command palette labels should be shown in the currently selected language. ## Actual Behavior Labels appear in a mix of the current and previous languages (see screenshot — e.g. "जीवंत सहयोग..." and "साझा करें" remained in Hindi while the surrounding items rendered in English). ## Screenshot ## Environment - Reproducible on https://excalidraw.com and latest `master`
author: jithu2111

title: Feature request: Export draft templates as PowerPoint files
body:
# Feature Request: Export Draft Templates as PowerPoint

## Problem Statement
Currently, when working on draft templates in Illustrate.co, users need to make edits directly within the platform. It would be more convenient to export these drafts as PowerPoint (.pptx) files to edit them externally in Microsoft PowerPoint or other compatible software, then potentially reimport or use them elsewhere.

## Desired Functionality
- Add an "Export as PowerPoint" option for draft templates
- Preserve all formatting, layouts, and design elements when converting to .pptx format
- Support batch export functionality for multiple drafts

## Use Case
As a user, I want to:
1. Work on draft templates in Illustrate.co
2. Export them as PowerPoint files
3. Make additional edits in PowerPoint or share them with team members who use PowerPoint
4. Have the flexibility to edit presentations in external tools without being limited to the Illustrate.co platform

## Benefits
- Increased flexibility for users who prefer PowerPoint editing
- Better integration with existing PowerPoint workflows
- Easier collaboration with non-Illustrate.co users
- More versatile content output options

## Additional Context
This feature would be particularly useful for users who need to work across multiple design tools or share presentation templates with stakeholders who use standard Office applications.
author: miraclemanza

title: Feature Request: Add "Convert Shape" option for existing shapes
body:
Add a context menu option that allows users to convert an existing shape into another supported shape type while preserving its position, size, styling, and content where possible.

**Example workflow:**

* Right-click a shape (e.g. a circle).
* Select **Convert to**.
* Choose a target shape (e.g. Rectangle, Diamond, Ellipse, etc.).
* The selected shape is replaced with the chosen shape type while retaining applicable properties.

This would make it much faster to iterate on diagrams without deleting and recreating shapes when experimenting with different layouts or visual representations.
author: omavashia2005

title: embed slides
body:
